meta.botanical_consistency_rule: BOTAN-001: cilantro/coriander-seed and dill/dill-seed retain distinct pairing profiles despite shared species origin.
meta.dominant_flavor_rule: Evaluate the ingredient's dominant culinary contribution rather than botanical classification when assigning wine pairings.
meta.pairing_philosophy: Curated editorial pairing knowledge for herbs and spices — Dominant Flavor Rule pairs by culinary contribution, not botanical classification; ingredients, not recipes.
